title: MikroTik RBGroove52HPn, L3
description: The smallest outdoor model powered by RouterOS as usual. Very well designed and weather resistant. It has one 10/100 Ethernet port with passive PoE 9 to 30V DC support and an integrated Dual Band wireless card for 2.4GHz and 5GHz band with high output power - up to 1000 mW . Groove comes with 64 MB of RAM, 16 MB of storage and an L3 RouterOS license Device Power adapter PoE injector (2) duct tape
